# XORCISM Connector Catalogue

**1240 connectors** across **104 categories**. Each connector is a sub-directory (`connectors/<id>/`) with a `connector.json` manifest, a `run.py` and a `README.md`. This file is generated by `connectors/gen_index.py` — browse by category below.

> Loaders read the aggregated [`_index.json`](_index.json) (1 file) instead of scanning every manifest; this catalogue is the human/GitHub-browsable view.
